bounded_tasks: A: Coverage gap inventory (JA/EN exact numbers, hidden reasons, root causes)
B: In-play candidate inventory (up to 20 predictions with codex_next_move)
C: Tracker currentness recommendations (up to 5 items with done_definition)
D: Stop-proof outputs update (all 5 mandatory files)

completion_definition: All 4 bounded tasks (A/B/C/D) complete. All 5 mandatory deliverables written. Coverage gap quantified. 20 in-play candidates identified. 5 recommendations with done_definitions provided.

global_numbers.note: distribution_allowed_ratio rose from 44.73% (v3) to 80.38% — CAP-1 through CAP-4 appear partially applied

ja_coverage.coverage_gap: 91.17% of 1121 predictions are NOT visible on JA tracker
ja_coverage.root_cause_primary: 1022 predictions reference Ghost URLs that are not live (no_live_article). These are articles that were either never published, were draft-demoted by QA Sentinel, or have slugs that don't resolve.
ja_coverage.root_cause_secondary: 197 predictions have articles published only in EN. JA versions of these articles don't exist in Ghost.

en_coverage.coverage_gap: 82.43% of 1121 predictions are NOT visible on EN tracker
en_coverage.root_cause_primary: 924 predictions reference Ghost URLs that are not live. Same root cause as JA: articles not published or draft-demoted.
en_coverage.root_cause_secondary: 89 predictions have articles published only in JA. EN translations don't exist.

in_play_thinness.diagnosis: 628 RESOLVING predictions have Q2 2026 deadlines but only 3 JA / 0 EN appear as 'in-play'. The page builder's in-play criteria is too restrictive or the predictions lack a field that triggers in-play classification. Most are stuck in 'awaiting' status on the tracker.
in_play_thinness.conversion_opportunity: If even 10% of the 84 JA awaiting moved to in-play, JA tracker would have 11 in-play predictions (3.7x current). For EN, 19 of 193 awaiting moving to in-play would be transformative.

linked_articles_structural_gap.note: prediction_db.json has NO linked_articles arrays populated. The prediction-to-article link is solely via ghost_url field. The integrity checker uses ghost_url to determine if the article is live. This is a fragile single-point link.

hidden_sample_analysis.dominant_reason: no_live_article (vast majority — articles not reachable at ghost_url)
hidden_sample_analysis.secondary_reason: cross_lang_only (article exists only in other language)
hidden_sample_analysis.pattern_observed: Many EN hidden predictions have romanized-Japanese slugs (e.g., 'toranpugatong-shang-fa-di-122tiao...') indicating these are JA articles that were never translated to EN. The ghost_url points to the JA slug, not an EN path.

task_b_in_play_candidates.selection_criteria: RESOLVING status + deadline in Q2 2026 (April-June) or with ISO date >= 2026-04-04 + diverse topic coverage + high-signal predictions (clear resolution question)

candidates.codex_next_move: Check if deadline has passed. If YES: run auto_verifier. If NO: mark as in-play on tracker.

selection_summary.note: 4 predictions (NP-0048, NP-0078, NP-0074, NP-0015/Pentagon) may have deadlines already passed. Codex should check and resolve these first.

task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.title: Implement batch in-play promotion for Q2-deadline RESOLVING predictions
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.why_now: 628 RESOLVING predictions have Q2 2026 deadlines but only 3 JA / 0 EN appear as in-play. The tracker page looks empty. This is the single largest UX gap — readers see 'awaiting' for predictions that should be actively tracked.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.expected_impact: JA in-play: 3 -> 8-12. EN in-play: 0 -> 10-15. Tracker transforms from 'mostly empty' to 'actively tracking dozens of live predictions'.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.risk: low — changing display status does not affect prediction integrity or Brier calculation
target_files_for_codex: scripts/prediction_db.json (status field or add in_play_display flag)
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.done_definition: After page rebuild: JA public_in_play_rows >= 8 AND EN public_in_play_rows >= 10 AND all promoted predictions have Q2 2026 deadlines.

task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.title: Auto-resolve past-deadline RESOLVING predictions
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.why_now: Multiple predictions have deadlines that have already passed (March 2026 and earlier) but remain in RESOLVING status. These should be resolved by auto_verifier or manually. Stale RESOLVING predictions degrade tracker credibility.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.expected_impact: Cleans up 50-200 stale predictions. Increases resolved count (currently 58). Improves Brier Score sample size.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.risk: medium — auto-resolution needs correct verdict. Recommend batch with human review for ambiguous cases.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.done_definition: All predictions with ISO deadline < 2026-04-04 are RESOLVED (with verdict) OR flagged for manual review. Zero RESOLVING predictions with deadline > 30 days past.

task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.title: Fix hidden_no_live_article for top-20 in-play candidates
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.why_now: The 20 candidates in Task B are hidden because their Ghost articles aren't live. Until articles are live, these predictions can't appear on the tracker regardless of classification logic changes.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.expected_impact: 20 predictions become visible. Direct prerequisite for TCR-1.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.risk: low — publishing/republishing articles is a normal Ghost operation
target_files_for_codex: Ghost Admin API (publish or republish articles for 20 slugs)
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.done_definition: All 20 candidate article slugs return HTTP 200 from nowpattern.com. Integrity report shows these 20 as public (not hidden).

task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.title: Populate linked_articles field in prediction_db.json
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.why_now: ALL 1121 predictions have linked_articles=[] (empty). The only prediction-to-article link is ghost_url. This is fragile: if a slug changes, the link breaks silently. Adding linked_articles enables richer cross-referencing.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.expected_impact: Structural improvement. Enables future features: article-count-per-prediction, multi-article predictions, integrity checking.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.risk: low — additive change, no existing data modified
target_files_for_codex: scripts/prediction_db.json (populate linked_articles from ghost_url + Ghost API)
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.done_definition: At least 200 predictions have linked_articles with valid slug entries. Integrity report coverage_pct increases.

task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.title: Create cross-language article pairs for top hidden_cross_lang_only predictions
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.why_now: 197 JA-hidden predictions exist only in EN. 89 EN-hidden exist only in JA. Creating translations for the highest-value predictions would increase both JA and EN coverage.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.expected_impact: JA coverage_pct: 8.83% -> ~10% (if 20 EN-only articles get JA versions). EN coverage_pct: 17.57% -> ~18.5%.
task_c_tracker_currentness_recommendatio.done_definition: At least 10 cross_lang_only predictions in each language gain a same-language article. hidden_cross_lang_only counts decrease.

distribution_update_note.interpretation: CAP-1 through CAP-4 from v3 appear to have been partially or fully applied between v3 and v4 sessions. distribution_blocked dropped from 262 to 93. truth_blocked remains 0.
